items.name: 2 Piece Chicken Meal
items.description: 2 pieces of local, fresh Chicken, hand cut and breaded in our Signature recipe. Plus small Taters, small Salad and can of Pop. Choose Original, Spicy or a split of both.
items.simplified_description: Two pieces of fresh chicken with sides and a drink.
items.other_info: Choose Original, Spicy or a split of both.

items.name: Big Mary® Original
items.description: A whole Canada Grade A chicken breast, breaded in our Signature recipe, cooked golden brown, and served on a sesame seed bun with mayo and lettuce. Plus small Taters and can of Pop.
items.simplified_description: A breaded chicken breast sandwich with sides.
items.other_info: Includes small Taters and a drink.

items.name: Spicy Big Mary®
items.description: A whole Canada Grade A chicken breast, breaded in our Signature recipe, cooked golden brown, seasoned with a hot cayenne kick, and served on a sesame seed bun with pickles and our Spicy Mayo. Plus small Taters and can of Pop.
items.simplified_description: A spicy breaded chicken breast sandwich with sides.
items.other_info: Includes small Taters and a drink.

items.name: Buffalo Mary
items.description: A whole Canada Grade A chicken breast, breaded and cooked golden brown, slathered in a spicy Buffalo sauce, topped with Blue Cheese dressing and lettuce, and served on a sesame seed bun. Plus small Taters and can of Pop.
items.simplified_description: A spicy chicken sandwich with Buffalo sauce and sides.
items.other_info: Includes small Taters and a drink.

items.name: Wings
items.description: Enjoy our delicious chicken wings, perfectly sauced and tossed with a variety of bold flavours, including Sweet Heat, Buffalo, Hot Honey, and Dry-Rub Honey BBQ.
items.simplified_description: Chicken wings with various sauces.

items.name: Mash-up Bowl
items.description: Our creamy mashed potatoes topped with our house-made gravy, Honey BBQ seasoned chicken Pop-Ins, and crispy onion bits.
items.simplified_description: Mashed potatoes with gravy and chicken bits.

items.name: Crispy Chicken Twist Buffalo
items.description: A tortilla filled with pulled chicken, mixed shredded cheese and zesty Buffalo sauce, deep fried and served crispy.
items.simplified_description: A crispy tortilla with chicken and cheese.

items.name: Biscuits
items.description: Tender, flaky and melt-in-your-mouth good! Made with real buttermilk and served golden brown with a brush of butter-y flavour.
items.simplified_description: Flaky buttermilk biscuits.

items.name: Taters
items.description: Fresh Canadian potatoes, sliced in-store, breaded and seasoned to perfection, and cooked until perfectly crisp.
items.simplified_description: Crispy breaded potato slices.

items.name: Fries
items.description: Delicious, golden french fries.
items.simplified_description: Golden french fries.

items.name: Chocolate Chunk Cookie
items.description: Cookies with chocolate Chunks that melt in your mouth and are decadently soft.
items.simplified_description: Soft cookies with chocolate chunks.

items.name: Strawberry Cream Cheese Pie
items.description: A perfectly crispy deep-fried crust, bursting with a sweet strawberry filling and rich, smooth cream cheese.
items.simplified_description: Deep-fried pie with strawberry filling.

items.name: Banana Pudding
items.description: Creamy banana pudding, blended with vanilla biscuit and whipped cream, prepared in-store.
items.simplified_description: Creamy banana pudding with biscuits.

items.name: Chocolate Caramel Cup
items.description: Chocolate mousse layered with chocolate sponge cake and caramel.
items.simplified_description: Chocolate mousse with cake and caramel.
